events.description: The user navigates to the Askable Sessions page.
events.frame_description: The browser window is visible with the URL sessions.askable.com and the title 'Askable Sessions'. The main content area shows the text 'Thank you.'

events.description: Instructional text for the user study is progressively displayed on the screen, detailing a travel planning task.
events.frame_description: The screen displays a growing block of text providing a scenario about planning a holiday from Queensland to London, including instructions to show the planning process.

events.description: User clicks the 'Open' button on the instruction screen to begin the session, triggering a new browser tab.
events.frame_description: A dark instruction screen transitions to a browser window.

events.description: The browser navigates from a blank page to google.com.
events.frame_description: The 'Untitled' tab loads the Google homepage.

events.description: User clicks on the 'Askable Sessions' tab to switch focus away from Google.
events.frame_description: The active tab changes from Google to Askable Sessions.

events.description: User clicks the 'Askable' extension button in the browser toolbar, deactivating the extension panel.
events.frame_description: The browser toolbar shows the 'Askable' extension button losing its active blue highlight.

events.description: User clicks on the Askable extension button in the browser toolbar, indicated by the appearance of a UI separator line.
events.frame_description: The top-right corner of the browser showing tabs and the extension toolbar.

events.description: User hovers the cursor over the 'AI Mode' button, with the cursor stopping at multiple points on or near the element.
events.frame_description: A pill-shaped button labeled 'AI Mode' with a sparkle icon.

events.description: Scroll E (magnitude: 5.5, uniformity: 0.62)
User navigates from Google search results to the Expedia website by clicking on a sponsored result.
events.frame_description: Google search results page showing a sponsored link for Expedia.

events.description: The Expedia homepage finishes loading, transitioning from a blurred state to a clear view of travel category icons.
events.frame_description: Expedia homepage loading travel categories like Stays, Flights, and Packages.

events.description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Packages' travel category icon.
events.frame_description: Expedia homepage with the cursor positioned over the Packages icon.

events.description: User pauses on the Expedia homepage, likely reviewing the search form options for 'Stays'.
events.frame_description: Expedia homepage showing the default search form for hotel stays.

events.description: User types "london" into the "Going to" destination field, which triggers a search suggestion dropdown.
events.page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
events.frame_description: The Expedia homepage search widget showing the destination being entered.

events.description: Scroll E (magnitude: 33.7, uniformity: 0.70)
events.page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More

events.description: User pauses on the 'Packages' tab, which is currently selected as the active search mode.
events.page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
events.frame_description: Close-up of the 'Packages' and 'Activities' tabs on the Expedia homepage, with 'Packages' underlined in blue.

events.description: The page navigates to the hotel search results for London, as indicated by the URL and tab title change.
events.frame_description: The browser header shows a URL change and the tab title updating to 'London (and vicinity), England'.

events.description: The search results page updates its state, displaying a search progress bar ('Select stay') and a promotional banner about best prices.
events.frame_description: New UI elements like the 'Select stay' progress indicator and a dark blue price guarantee banner appear on the page.

events.description: User drags the price slider to set a minimum price of AU$516
events.page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results
events.frame_description: The user is adjusting the price filter on the search results page.

events.description: User pauses their cursor near the 'Price per traveller' section, likely reviewing filter options or preparing to adjust the price slider.
events.page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results
events.frame_description: The user is viewing the hotel search filters, including amenities like 'Breakfast included' and 'Gym', with the cursor resting near the price filter header.

events.description: User scrolls down the page to reveal more filter options, moving from the 'Popular filters' section to the 'Price per traveller' section.
events.page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results
events.frame_description: The page content shifts upwards, bringing the price filter into view.

events.description: User hovers over the right navigation arrow of the hotel image carousel.
events.page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results
events.frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the right arrow button on a hotel listing's image gallery.

events.description: User hovered the cursor over a session identifier string.
events.page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results
events.frame_description: The cursor is positioned over a long alphanumeric string, likely a session ID, displayed above hotel interior images.

events.description: User is reading the prompt 'Are you done with the task?' on the Askable Sessions page.
events.frame_description: A dark screen with a prompt asking the user if they are finished with the task, featuring 'Open' and 'Repeat the task instructions' buttons.
